text: @Amarabena I am actually surprised how Luos can be that cheap to fall for that card..to allow themselves to fight someone's fight..who incidentally is the one that single handedly built wamunyoro
label: hate
rationale: 'how Luos can be that cheap' attributes collective gullibility/cheapness to the Luo community as a group - NCIC-standard collective contempt.

text: @GlitteringAnge No. It is Gachagua sending kikuyus to hate other tribes.
label: neither
rationale: Criticism directed at named politician Gachagua as the agent; Kikuyus appear as instruments of his action, not as a group being attacked.

text: @Disembe Luos keep combing the archives to look for any Luhya whom they can use to beat Sifuna. They have tortured Ababu Namwamba. Now they've let Ababu recover Abit. MDVD & Sifuna are not the same; -tribe -personality -age -circumstance It's like RAO and Oloo Aringo They're as di
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos keep combing the archives to look for any Luhya whom they can use' and 'tortured Ababu Namwamba' attributes collective manipulative and abusive conduct to the Luo community - NCIC collective negative characterisation.

text: @kipmurkomen Just a polite reminder! A Kalenjin beyond William Ruto is a PIPE DREAM! Feel free to buy goons, import Burundi, Ethiopian and Somali voters, transport goons everywhere but do not forget A KALENJIN WILL NEVER BE VOTED AS PRESIDENT until Jehovah's return! #RutoMustGo
label: hate
rationale: 'A KALENJIN WILL NEVER BE VOTED AS PRESIDENT' declares the entire Kalenjin community categorically unfit to hold the presidency - direct parallel to ex11, NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @LePapillonBlu2 the Kenyan was a CIA installed communist sent to destroy America, a racist gay muslim halfbreed POS, he destroyed our Health Care system, set race relations back to 1960 & committed treason by spying on a sitting President & stealing an election, should be in prison for life
label: hate
rationale: 'racist gay muslim halfbreed POS' weaponises race, religion, and ethnic origin as slurs against an individual - the ethnic/religious markers are the operative insults.

text: @NelsonHavi Wewe ni malaya...hujaongea ya matiangi tge ruaraka land thief
label: offensive
rationale: 'malaya' (prostitute) and 'land thief' are crude personal insults directed at an individual with no ethnic group targeting.

text: @_DCPTV This gachagua never learns. Never trust kalenjins
label: hate
rationale: 'Never trust kalenjins' transfers distrust from Gachagua onto the entire Kalenjin community - textbook NCIC collective negative attribution.

text: @therealantoh FUCKING ARROGANT MENTALITY 🤔THERE IS NO LUO WHO CAN SAY "SISI NDIO SIFUNA", BECAUSE EDWIN SIFUNA AND HIS MULEMBE COMMUNITY WERE SO STUPID WHEN THEY SUPPORTED RAILA ODINGA FOR MORE THAN 30 YEARS ? IS THAT WHAT WHAT YOU MEAN?? LUHYAS WERE DUMB WHEN THEY SUPPORTED RAILA??🤔🤔🤔
label: hate
rationale: 'LUHYAS WERE DUMB' and the Mulembe community 'WERE SO STUPID' collectively attribute stupidity to the Luhya community as a group - NCIC collective contempt, even if framed as rhetorical challenge.

text: @SaraEisen @startupfest Sara your the dirty Jew. You went from finance to attacking our mayor. Your a racist piece of shit Jew just like bill Ackman
label: hate
rationale: 'dirty Jew' and 'racist piece of shit Jew' use Jewish ethnicity/religion as the operative slur - group-based dehumanising attack.

text: @cleme74076 @prossoff 77 hakuna maandamano gavoo wajinga sana na walivyo wajinga December 25 watatangaza maandamano gavoo itajaa upepo pia kutumia magharama na kuangaika afu maandamano hakuna then watapanga pasaka gavoo pia itaangaika afu hakuna k2 sasa gavoo ndo wataonekana hawajielewi
label: neither
rationale: Political mockery of a protest movement ('gavoo') and its organisers; 'wajinga' directed at political actors, not an ethnic community.

text: @SaginiJojez @esolojnr @Asamoh_ Kikuyus fear luos and luhyas uniting. Luhyas wakubali kunite kwisha mlima
label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc coalition arithmetic - 'Kikuyus fear luos and luhyas uniting' is electoral strategy analysis with no contempt expressed toward any group.

text: Wamunyoro tribal bigots must referee our referee!
label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro tribal bigots' applies the collective attribute of bigotry to the Munyoro community as a group - NCIC collective negative characterisation.

text: @SeeRacists That's what happens when indigenous adults become cowards. Once upon a time melanin magnificence had dignity.
label: neither
rationale: Lament about loss of dignity in an indigenous or Black community framed with pride rather than contempt toward any group; no identifiable target attacked.

text: @Dr_AustinOmondi 🤣jaluos are here singing tutam claptrap meanwhile kales are getting scholarship to countries such as Australia, London, Ireland and America. Wajinga nyinyi
label: hate
rationale: 'jaluos... wajinga nyinyi' collectively ridicules the Luo community as foolish - NCIC contempt standard, the comparison to Kalenjins is used to demean Luos as a group.

text: But it's being overseen by a Kikuyu called kindiki. Nyinyi bado ni kutumia foreskin na mnaona hao by elections zao wanapewa hadi boat. How many have been delivered in nyanza!
label: hate
rationale: 'Nyinyi bado ni kutumia foreskin' ridicules Kikuyu circumcision practice and collectively attacks the community's cultural customs - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @smutoro Wetangula shamelessly keeps repeating in every public meeting that "Kenya haitaki mkabila kama ule Wamûnyoro na shares". The president does the same and he has filled members of his ethnic community in executive & state corporations.
label: neither
rationale: Reports and criticises a named politician's tribalist statements and another leader's ethnic patronage - the author condemns the behaviour rather than endorsing it.

text: @BTT1024 Loop hole. What is it about you Indians that you can't understand we want you out of our country. I'll say it. We don't like you or your culture. Return to India and make India great. Just get hell out of our country.
label: hate
rationale: 'We want you out of our country... Return to India' is a direct expulsion call targeting Indians as an ethnic/national-origin group - plainest NCIC case.

text: Linda mwananchi just hit iceberg..below the see is morima tribalist who want monopolize kikuyu politics n crush all. It doesnt matter hr is fatally flawed after impeachment. Poor Irungu n ndidi thought they would tame him
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of named individual ('morima tribalist') and political actors within Kikuyu politics; the target is a specific person's conduct, not the Kikuyu community as a group.

text: Andhbhakts & their fantasies with: - Rapes & Harassment of women. - Murders - Rioting - Mob Lynching Then have the audacity to call Indian Muslims Terrorists.
label: hate
rationale: Post attributes crimes (rape, murder, mob lynching) to 'Andhbhakts' (Hindu nationalist supporters) as a group and contrasts them with Indian Muslims - collective negative attribution to a religiously/politically defined community.

text: I don't have anything against Kisiis from Nyamira (I'm one) but why spend your witchcraft dark magic kuroga mtoto wa mtu mwenye ameunda mansion kwa village instead of shifting that energy kuroga Kasongo na familia yake?
label: hate
rationale: 'Kisiis from Nyamira... your witchcraft dark magic' attributes witchcraft collectively to Kisiis as a community - NCIC contempt through collective negative characteristic, even with the self-identification caveat.

text: @Kibet_bull Na MURKOMEN anaongea takataka kila siku kwa tv.
label: offensive
rationale: 'anaongea takataka' (talks rubbish) is a personal insult directed at named politician Murkomen with no ethnic group targeting.

text: A friend was telling me that most of the killings during the 2007 PEV were committed by the police and the Mungiki thugs, not kalenjin vigilantes. Ni police ndio waliua the majority of the victims, followed by the Mungiki. Even the church in Kiambaa was burned down by the Mungiki. Kalenjins don't kill women and children during war.
label: hate
rationale: 'Kalenjins don't kill women and children during war' presents an essentialising collective claim about Kalenjin conduct in war - while framed defensively, the final assertion attributes a distinct collective character to the community in a conflict framing; rated medium given the ambiguity of exculpatory framing.

text: @_Dayspuff @KevvinMwangi Same uhunye that we voted for him 4 times only to betray us and show us the true colors of kikuyus. You didn't vote for raila because to you ruto was the lesser evil you had to choose between to people that you didn't want.
label: hate
rationale: 'show us the true colors of kikuyus' transfers Uhuru's alleged betrayal onto the entire Kikuyu community - textbook NCIC collective attribution from a leader's conduct to his ethnic group.

text: @citizentvkenya Embu, Tharaka nithi and Meru mumetosha to negotiate with others... Kikuyus have taken you for fools since independence. Kama Fred Matiangi can be an option why not you Mt Kenya East? You are more than the Kisii Nation 💪🏾 @CecilyMbarire @gk_ruku
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus have taken you for fools since independence' attributes collective deceptive/domineering conduct to Kikuyus as an ethnic group across all of history - NCIC collective negative characterisation.

text: @Naomikibandi I didn't that murima are so stupid to follow air in the name of Gachagua. My in-laws, please up your game
label: hate
rationale: 'murima are so stupid' collectively attributes stupidity to the murima community - NCIC contempt standard even though softened by 'my in-laws'.
